rationale: Has 6.3 years of applied ML production experience at product companies (Haptik, Flipkart) including recommendation-style features, but skills are oriented toward forecasting, diffusion models, and LlamaIndex rather than IR/ranking systems, vector databases, or evaluation metrics like NDCG/MAP.

Entire 5.7-year career spent at IT-services firms (TCS, Capgemini) in mobile/cloud engineering roles with zero production ML experience; AI exposure is limited to self-study and a small RAG side project.

Non-technical career spanning accounting, marketing, HR, and mechanical engineering with no ML or software engineering work; includes a role at Initech (fictional honeypot company) and zero AI/ML skills.

Entire career is in non-technical roles (Business Analyst at Wipro, Customer Support, Operations Manager) with no engineering or ML production experience; GenAI interest is limited to online courses and LangChain experimentation.

Career is entirely non-technical for AI purposes — Civil Engineer, Graphic Designer, Content Writer — with no ML engineering experience despite a tier_1 IIIT Hyderabad credential; skills show only Spring Boot, Tally, and Vue.js beginner-level entries.

Only 1.2 years of total experience at a single IT-services firm (Tech Mahindra) in full-stack web dev; Hugging Face Transformers and pgvector skills suggest ML interest but lack any production IR/ranking deployment at meaningful scale.

Career is entirely in content writing and project management at non-engineering companies including Stark Industries (fictional honeypot), with no ML or software engineering background; skills are Apache Flink and Salesforce CRM at beginner/intermediate level unrelated to IR.

12.8-year career spans mechanical engineering, operations, and business analysis at Wipro, Infosys, and Pied Piper (fictional honeypot company) with no ML or software engineering skills; top skills are React, SQL, and PowerPoint.

4 years at product companies (Ola, Freshworks) with production NLP pipelines and recommendation features, advanced Weaviate proficiency (57 months) matching the vector DB requirement, and IIIT Hyderabad B.Tech; gaps are below the preferred experience range and title/summary suggests CV specialization, with no explicit NDCG/MAP evaluation framework experience cited.

Career consists entirely of content writing, SEO, operations management, and graphic design at companies including Pied Piper and Stark Industries (fictional honeypots), with no software engineering or ML skills; web skills (PostgreSQL, JavaScript, Flask) are at beginner level with no AI/IR experience.
